risk_addressed.description: 9 active features shipping simultaneously with overlapping position-sizing logic made paper trading results unattributable to any specific change.
risk_addressed.root_cause: feat-ic-weighted-scoring and feat-regime-router both activated on 2026-03-30 (same day), followed by feat-alpha-pipeline-v2 on 2026-04-01 (2 days later). No observation window enforcement existed. All three features simultaneously affect the signal score, which feeds the conviction multiplier in risk.py Layer 2. Additionally, VIX is consumed twice: Kelly fraction (risk.py Layer 1) AND regime router dimension multipliers (signals.py). A +/-week of paper trading results cannot be attributed to any single change.

deliverables.description: Observation-window enforcer. SIZING_AFFECTING_FEATURES frozenset classifies features by sizing impact. can_activate() blocks new activations within 7-day window. record_activation() persists to data/feature_activation_log.json (atomic write). get_status() for dashboard injection. ANALYTICS_ONLY_FEATURES exempt from constraint.

Backfilled activation history: feat-vix-kelly (2026-03-29), feat-ic-weighted-scoring (2026-03-30), feat-regime-router (2026-03-30), feat-alpha-pipeline-v2 (2026-04-01). Each record notes the violation where it occurred.

32 tests across 5 classes: TestCanActivate (10), TestRecordActivation (7), TestGetStatus (5), TestAnalyticsOnlyExempt (3), TestBackfillIntegrity (7). All passing. TestBackfillIntegrity.test_regime_router_and_ic_shipped_same_day documents the root-cause violation as a permanent test.

wip_policy extended with observation_window block: 7-day minimum between sizing-affecting activations, enforcement pointer to feature_sequencer.py, next_allowed_sizing_activation: 2026-04-08, lists of sizing-affecting and analytics-only features.
Added sequencer_status: analytics_only_no_constraint and note confirming feat-alpha-decay is exempt from the observation window (read-only, no sizing path).

features_currently_live_and_interacting: feat-vix-kelly (risk.py Layer 1 — Kelly fraction from VIX rank)
feat-regime-router (VIX → dimension multipliers → signal score + regime mult)
current_state.known_interaction: VIX double-counted: Kelly fraction AND regime router both read VIX independently. Phase 3 of feat-ic-weighted-scoring will disable regime_routing_enabled when HMM weights are stable. No earlier fix needed — the interaction is documented and bounded.

what_does_not_change: feat-dim-flags (shipped) — gating mechanism, not a new sizing path, exempt
No live trades blocked — paper account only
next_steps: On 2026-04-08: run feature_sequencer.can_activate() before enabling any next sizing feature
Call record_activation() when a new sizing feature is turned on
Phase 3 of feat-ic-weighted-scoring (BACK-003 HMM): disable regime_routing_enabled to resolve VIX double-counting
